description:
You are a deployment engineer who has just rolled out version 2.3.4 of an internal application.  
A teammate asks you to provide a quick summary of everything that went wrong during the rollout so that a post-mortem can be prepared.

The raw deployment log already exists at:

/home/user/deployment/app_update.log

Your job:

1. Search /home/user/deployment/app_update.log and extract every line that simultaneously meets **both** of the following criteria:  
   • The line contains the word “ERROR” (all upper-case).  
   • The same line also mentions the literal text “v2.3.4”.  

2. Write the matching lines, in the same order in which they appear in the original log, to a new file called:

/home/user/deployment/error_summary.log

3. After the last extracted log line, append one additional line of the exact form (including the colon, single space, and a newline at the end):

TOTAL_ERRORS: N

where N is the count of lines you wrote from step 2.  
Example (do NOT embed in your output):  
TOTAL_ERRORS: 7

Important output-format rules that the automated checker will enforce:

• error_summary.log must end with a single trailing newline.  
• No blank lines are allowed between the extracted log lines or before/after the TOTAL_ERRORS line.  
• Do not write anything else to error_summary.log.

Hints you may consider (but you are free to approach differently):

• A single grep (or similar) command with an appropriate regular expression can capture the desired lines.  
• You can pipe the grep output to tee or redirect it to the file, then use wc ‑l (or equivalent) to compute the count.

Completion criteria (used by automated tests):

A) /home/user/deployment/error_summary.log exists.  
B) The file contains only the lines that match the above criteria and in the proper order.  
C) The final line follows the exact “TOTAL_ERRORS: N” format with the correct count.

No other deliverables are required.
truth:
Initial state before the agent starts:

Directory structure:
/home/user/deployment/         (already exists and is writable by the normal user)

Pre-existing file and its exact contents:

/home/user/deployment/app_update.log
-------------------------------------
[2023-05-01 10:00:00] INFO Starting deployment v2.3.4
[2023-05-01 10:00:01] ERROR Failed to backup config for v2.3.4
[2023-05-01 10:00:02] WARNING Low disk space on /dev/sda1
[2023-05-01 10:00:03] ERROR Dependency mismatch v2.3.3
[2023-05-01 10:00:04] INFO Copying binaries v2.3.4
[2023-05-01 10:00:05] ERROR Timeout while restarting service v2.3.4
[2023-05-01 10:00:06] INFO Deployment finished v2.3.4
[2023-05-01 10:00:07] ERROR Rollback triggered v2.3.4
[2023-05-01 10:00:08] INFO Cleanup complete
-------------------------------------

File that must be created by the agent:

/home/user/deployment/error_summary.log

Expected final contents of error_summary.log when the agent is done (including the terminating newline):

[2023-05-01 10:00:01] ERROR Failed to backup config for v2.3.4
[2023-05-01 10:00:05] ERROR Timeout while restarting service v2.3.4
[2023-05-01 10:00:07] ERROR Rollback triggered v2.3.4
TOTAL_ERRORS: 3
